mentions.note: Part of 'Big Five Travel' theme (long on money, short on time); trade together as terrific group ahead of earnings.
CEO Scott Kirby highly respected; Cramer prefers United over JetBlue despite nice service experience.
Reports Tuesday after close; Trump admin likely to okay merger with American despite prior exec approval caution; consolidation tailwind.
Traders speculate on Iran peace rumors causing oil-driven volatility; Cramer warns this is pure guessing without edge, not investing; avoid endless on/off trading based on geopolitical noise.

Structural industry shifts toward brand loyalty over price-cutting; removing lower-margin capacity vs. slashing prices. CEO Kirby cites permanent, irreversible competitive changes. Up 15% YTD, fresh highs. Currently 13x earnings with EPS growing $10 (2026) → $15 (2027) → $17 (2028). Multiple expansion play if secular growth thesis holds. Buy into weakness.
